name: Rocket nozzle tuning
summary: A synthetic conversation about tuning a flywheel shooter exit velocity.

chat_messages.text: How do I tune the flywheel exit velocity for a foam ball shooter?

content.text: How do I tune the flywheel exit velocity for a foam ball shooter?

chat_messages.text: Start near 45 degrees hood angle and calibrate kSpeed against measured distance.

content.text: Start near 45 degrees hood angle and calibrate kSpeed against measured distance.

name: 全文检索讨论
summary: 关于全文检索与索引优化的合成对话（测试用假数据）。

chat_messages.text: 全文检索用 trigram 还是倒排索引？这个索引怎么优化？

content.text: 全文检索用 trigram 还是倒排索引？这个索引怎么优化？

chat_messages.text: 小数据量下 trigram 足够，索引优化取决于查询模式。这是合成示例文本。

content.text: 小数据量下 trigram 足够，索引优化取决于查询模式。这是合成示例文本。

chat_messages.text: Here is a fake credential in raw content: sk-ant-FAKEFAKEFAKEFAKEFAKE1234567890 — the evidence layer must keep it, memory must reject it.

content.text: Here is a fake credential in raw content: sk-ant-FAKEFAKEFAKEFAKEFAKE1234567890 — the evidence layer must keep it, memory must reject it.
